section.heading: Economic and commercial officers at United States embassies and missions in Poland and Hungary
section.chapeau: It is the sense of the Congress that, to the extent practicable—

paragraph.content: the United States Embassy in Budapest, Hungary, should be assigned one additional economic and commercial officer;
the United States Embassy in Warsaw, Poland, should be assigned one additional economic officer and one additional commercial officer;
the United States Trade Center in Warsaw, Poland, should be assigned one additional economic and commercial officer; and
the United States mission in Krakow, Poland, should be assigned one additional economic and commercial officer.
